metadata.name: The Real deal
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: Ancient seals have been scattered across the land. Recover them from dangerous dungeons and return them to the altar in Emberhollow to restore the protective ward.

towns.name: Emberhollow
towns.description: A sleepy village surrounded by ancient oaks and whispering meadows.

towns.name: Frostbrook
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

key_dungeons.name: Lost Halls
key_dungeons.description: A narrow crevice leads into Lost Halls. The sound of dripping water echoes endlessly below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Lost Halls and recover the lost Emerald Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.
